item.title: South West Pinnacle Exploration Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 248.75 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: South West Pinnacle Exploration Ltd has reached a significant milestone by touching an all-time high price of Rs.248.75 on 13 April 2026, marking a remarkable surge in its market performance and reflecting the company’s sustained growth trajectory within the diversified commercial services sector. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Indo Tech Transformers Ltd Surges 7.07% to Day's High of Rs 1399 — Outperforms Sector by 4.76 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 1.07% on 13 Apr 2026, while Indo Tech Transformers Ltd surged 7.07%, outperforming its sector by 4.76 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain rewrites the short-term narrative for the stock, which had opened the day with a 3.42% gap down but rallied strongly to touch an intraday high of Rs 1399, a 5.38% rise from the low. Such a rebound within the session highlights a significant shift in intraday momentum — is this a genuine recovery or a relief rally that will fade at the 100-day moving average? Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Humming Bird Education Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 14 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline has pushed Humming Bird Education Ltd to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 14 on 13 Apr 2026, marking an 85.11% drop over the past year and signalling sustained selling pressure despite broader market resilience. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Thangamayil Jewellery Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 4215.3
item.description: From a 52-week low of Rs 1,750 to a fresh peak of Rs 4,215.3 on 13 Jun 2026, Thangamayil Jewellery Ltd has more than doubled in value over the past year, outpacing the Sensex’s modest 2.06% gain. This remarkable rally is underpinned by a confluence of technical signals that have propelled the stock to new heights despite a challenging broader market backdrop. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Thangamayil Jewellery Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 4,215 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Thangamayil Jewellery Ltd has reached a significant milestone by touching its all-time high price on 13 April 2026, reflecting a remarkable journey of sustained growth and robust financial performance within the Gems, Jewellery and Watches sector. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Thermax Ltd. Rallies 5.08% and Approaches 50 DMA Resistance — A Key Technical Test Ahead
item.description: Despite opening sharply lower by 3.58%, Thermax Ltd. staged a robust recovery on 13 Apr 2026, surging 5.08% to touch an intraday high of Rs 3,825. This outperformance by 3.17 percentage points over its sector highlights a stock-specific momentum shift amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Micro-Cap JHS Svendgaard Retail Ventures Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit — Rs 0.20 Crore Turnover and Rising Delivery Tell the Story
item.description: At Rs 26.37, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. JHS Svendgaard Retail Ventures Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 20% on 13 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Waaree Energies Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Signalling Bullish Market Positioning
item.description: Waaree Energies Ltd has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, with a 15.09% increase to 46,014 contracts, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. This rise accompanies a robust volume of 77,378 contracts and a strong price performance, reflecting growing investor confidence in the mid-cap electrical equipment company. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Below All Moving Averages and Now at Lower Circuit: VIP Clothing Ltd Loses 9.5% in a Single Session
item.description: At Rs 21.77, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. VIP Clothing Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 9.52% on 13 Apr 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price, signalling persistent selling pressure in a micro-cap stock with limited liquidity. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: VL E-Governance & IT Solutions Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 4.99% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 14.53, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. VL E-Governance & IT Solutions Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.99% on 13 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Power Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Strong Price Momentum
item.description: Adani Power Ltd has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, coinciding with robust price gains and sustained buying momentum. The stock’s open interest jumped by 26.8% to 28,758 contracts, signalling heightened market participation and potential directional bets by traders amid a strong eight-day rally that has delivered over 20% returns. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Amber Enterprises Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Amber Enterprises India Ltd has witnessed a notable 14.36% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a modest decline in the stock price, the surge in open interest and volume suggests evolving directional bets amid a complex market backdrop. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Tata Power Surges on High-Value Trading Amid Institutional Interest
item.description: Tata Power Company Ltd emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks by value on 13 April 2026, registering a significant uptick in price and volume despite a broadly subdued market environment. The stock outperformed its sector and the benchmark Sensex, reflecting strong investor interest and notable institutional participation amid evolving market dynamics. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: S.A.L Steel Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5.44% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 49.7, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. S.A.L Steel Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5.44% on 13 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Raj Rayon Industries Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 1.96% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 20.96, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. Raj Rayon Industries Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 1.96% on 13 Apr 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price, underscoring the persistent selling pressure in this micro-cap stock. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Bharti Airtel Ltd Sees Robust Value Trading Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: Bharti Airtel Ltd, a dominant player in the Indian telecom sector, recorded one of the highest value turnovers on 13 Apr 2026, reflecting sustained investor interest despite a recent downgrade in its Mojo Grade. The stock’s trading activity and price movements reveal a nuanced picture of market sentiment and technical positioning. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Godfrey Phillips India Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Market Weakness
item.description: Godfrey Phillips India Ltd. (GODFRYPHLP) witnessed a notable 13.3% increase in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment on 13 Apr 2026, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this surge, the stock underperformed its FMCG sector peers and the broader Sensex, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish and bearish sentiments among traders. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex and Nifty Retreat Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends; Utilities Shine as Auto Slumps
item.description: The Indian equity market witnessed a volatile session on 13 Apr 2026, with the Sensex opening sharply lower but recovering some losses by the close. Despite a late bounce, the benchmark index ended the day down over 800 points, weighed down primarily by the auto sector, while utilities and power stocks emerged as bright spots amid a broadly negative market breadth. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Sees Modest Decline Amid Mixed Stock Performances
item.description: The BSE Midcap 150 index experienced a modest decline of 0.62% on 13 Apr 2026, reflecting a cautious market mood amid uneven sectoral contributions and a broad-based decline in stock breadth. Despite the overall dip, select mid-cap stocks delivered notable returns, underscoring pockets of resilience within the segment. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Sees Broad Decline Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, experienced a modest decline of 0.95% as defensive and cyclical stocks diverged in performance. While Tata Power emerged as the best performer with a 3.63% gain, Eicher Motors lagged significantly, posting a 4.20% loss. The advance-decline ratio further highlighted the cautious market mood, with only 20 stocks advancing against 80 declining, reflecting a 0.25x ratio. Time: 24 minutes ago

item.title: {{list.post_title}}
item.description: {{list.post_excerpt}} Time: {{list.post_date_sep}}
